data.body: SHA/CRITERIA RACE: origin/main moved 5ff60da4->ce1989cb->d9bb3be0 mid-review (maintainer landing plan-review criteria changes ~30-60min cadence). Claim checks (1) attestation sha==worktree HEAD, (2) criteria fingerprint unchanged. Prior attestations signed vs moving origin => invalid. FIX: pin worktree base to origin/main d9bb3be0, run ALL reviews with --ref HEAD (reads my committed stack, signs at my fixed HEAD, deterministic, race-free, and required for stacked changes anyway). Re-running epic review --ref HEAD.
